basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Badmal Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Ordnance Factory Badmal (OFBL) Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://munitionsindia.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the OFBL Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years (for General Candidates) Age Relaxation: OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) - 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech. / Diploma in Chemical Engineering OR B.Sc Graduate with Chemistry. Must have Apprenticeship in Chemical Trade.
qualification.details: B.E / B.Tech. / Diploma in Chemical Engineering OR B.Sc Graduate with Chemistry as one of the major subjects. Apprenticeship in the Chemical Trade as per Apprenticeship Act 1961 in Ordnance Factories under Munitions India Limited OR in Factories manufacturing/handling ammunitions & explosives OR in Factories other than manufacturing/handling of ammunition & explosives.

salary_details.pay_scale: 1st Year: Rs. 36000/-, 2nd Year: Rs. 37080/-, 3rd Year: Rs. 38192/-, 4th Year: Rs. 39338/-
salary_details.details: 1st Year: Rs. 36000/- 2nd Year: Rs. 37080/- 3rd Year: Rs. 38192/- 4th Year: Rs. 39338/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ordnance Factory Badmal Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://munitionsindia.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16/05/2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Ordnance Factory Badmal Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 16/05/2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to ensure timely delivery.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E / B.Tech. / Diploma in Chemical Engineering or a B.Sc degree with Chemistry as a major subject. Additionally, an Apprenticeship in the Chemical Trade is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for General Candidates is between 18 to 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post in Ordnance Factory Badmal.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for this tenure-based position?
faq.answer: The salary is structured annually: Rs. 36000/- for the 1st year, Rs. 37080/- for the 2nd year, Rs. 38192/- for the 3rd year, and Rs. 39338/- for the 4th year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by a Personal Interaction/Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Ordnance Factory Badmal located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Badmal is located in Badmal, District Balangir, Odisha, with the pincode 767070.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Graduate & Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post is Contractual, on a tenure basis.
